created.description: The timestamp when the user was created in the identity source

externalId.description: The external ID of the user in the identity source

id.description: The ID of the user in the identity source

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp when the user was last updated in the identity source

profile.description: Contains a set of external user attributes and their values that are mapped to Okta standard and custom profile properties. See the [`profile` object](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/openapi/okta-management/management/user/getuser#user/getuser/t=response&c=200&path=profile) and Declaration of a Custom Identity Source Schema in [Using anything as a source](https://help.okta.com/okta_help.htm?ty

mobilePhone.description: Mobile phone number of the user

secondEmail.description: Alternative email address of the user
